Changzhou Jianhu Inner Decoration Materials Co., Ltd. presents another profound example of raw data corruption masking a defunct township enterprise. Incorrectly classified as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer', its forensic history (extracted from the 'industry_medium' field) reveals its true origin: founded in 1988 as 'Wujin Jianhu Coating Factory', later pivoting to 'Jianhu Inner Decoration Materials'. However, the critical inclusion of 'non-residential real estate leasing', combined with a corrected workforce of only 2 insured employees (2024), confirms the enterprise has entirely ceased physical manufacturing. It now operates strictly as a micro asset-holding shell, leasing out its legacy factory site in Wujin District.
